properties.displayName: Azure API for FHIR (HealthcareApis services) should disable public network access
properties.description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that legacy Azure API for FHIR resources (Microsoft.HealthcareApis/services) are not exposed on the public internet and can only be reached from a private endpoint. Microsoft's built-in policy only audits for an approved private endpoint connection; this custom definition denies on the publicNetworkAccess field for stronger enforcement. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/fhir-privatelink.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
